name: petrolimex-fuel-api
description: Unofficial API for Vietnamese fuel prices scraped from Petrolimex. / API không chính thức về giá xăng dầu tại Việt Nam từ Petrolimex.

scripts.test:scrapers: node tests/scrapers/petrolimex.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/pvoil.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/mipec.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/comeco.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/saigonpetro.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/petrotimes.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/webgia.smoke.js && node tests/scrapers/giaxanghomnay.smoke.js
